zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Pickering於1514年出生在英國素福爾可利斯布利其時，她的父親Christopher Pickering30歲，母親Jane Lewknor22歲。她於1530年與Sir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdale結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年4月28日在英國英格蘭倫敦紐哈姆易亞斯特 漢姆聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇享年68歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可斯培爾恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Pickering于1514年出生在英国素福爾可利斯布利其时，她的父亲Christopher Pickering30岁，母亲Jane Lewknor22岁。她于1530年与Sir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdale结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1582年4月28日在英国英格兰倫敦紐哈姆易亞斯特 漢姆聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇享年68岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可斯培爾恩。

nameMeanings.name: Pickering
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pickering in North Yorkshire, named with an Old English group name, Piceringas, meaning ‘the people of a man named Pīcer’.
History: John Pickering of Newgate, Coventry, Warwickshire, England, came to MA in the early 1630s. He married Elizabeth Alderman in Ipswich, MA, in 1636 and moved a year later to Salem.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Pickering was born in 1514, in Risbridge, Suffolk, England, her father, Christopher Pickering, was 30 and her mother, Jane Lewknor, was 22. She married Sir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdale in 1530. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 28 April 1582, in St Mary Magdalene's Church, East Ham, Newham, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Spelthorne, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Pickering est née en 1514, à Risbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Pickering, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Jane Lewknor, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdale en 1530. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 avril 1582, à St Mary Magdalene's Church, East Ham, Newham, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Spelthorne, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Pickering 1514 in Risbridge, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Christopher Pickering 30 und ihre Mutter Jane Lewknor 22. Sie hat 1530 Sir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. April 1582 im Alter von 68 Jahren in St Mary Magdalene's Church, East Ham, Newham, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Spelthorne, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Pickering è nata il nel 1514 nel Risbridge, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Christopher Pickering, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Jane Lewknor, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdale nel 1530. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 aprile 1582, nel St Mary Magdalene's Church, East Ham, Newham, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Spelthorne, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Pickeringが1514年にイギリススフォルクリスブリッジで生まれた時，父Christopher Pickeringは30歳，母Jane Lewknorは22歳であった。1530年にSir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年4月28日にイギリスイギリスロンドンニューハムエアスト ハムスト マリー マグダリーネ'ス チャーチで68歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックススペルソルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Pickering(이)가 1514년 영국 수폴크 리스브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Christopher Pickering(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Lewknor(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1530년 Sir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 4월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 뉴함 이스트 함 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 c후르치에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 스플토른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Pickering nasceu em 1514, em Risbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Pickering, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Jane Lewknor, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdale em 1530. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de abril de 1582, em St Mary Magdalene's Church, East Ham, Newham, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Spelthorne, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Pickering родилась в 1514 г. в местности рисбридж, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Christopher Pickering было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Lewknor, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdale в 1530 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 апреля 1582 г. в местности ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, эаст хам, нюхам, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности спелтаурн, миддлесекс, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Francis Weston , Sir  of Kirby Lonsdale en 1530. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de abril de 1582, en St Mary Magdalene's Church, East Ham, Newham, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Spelthorne, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
